## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Design Engineer role in Client Operations & GTM at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeks a design engineer for client-facing projects, balancing autonomy with collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Role involves creating landing pages, micro-products, and systematizing design processes](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Compensation is currently budgeted at mid-level, though there may be flexibility for senior candidates](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Role Context

  - [GrowthX is an AI-native company with two main orgs: Deliver (client-facing) and Build (internal tech)](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Design engineers focus on product design to front-end, while marketing designers focus on aesthetics](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [The role is within Client Operations, involving product design work for clients and internal tools](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

### Role Responsibilities and Projects

  - [Create landing pages, templated programmatic pages, and more complex micro-products/communities](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Projects range from using existing brand guidelines to developing new ones from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Work involves "vibe coding" and requires T-shaped skills in product and brand design](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Candidate Background (Steven Harley)

  - [15+ years of web experience, transitioning from development to design](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Experience in agency work (ThoughtBot), freelancing, and product design (Material Security)](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Strong interest in the intersection of design and engineering, exploring vibe coding](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)

### Work Process and Collaboration

  - [Projects start with a paid strategy sprint, analyzing client content and surfacing opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Month-to-month engagements follow, focusing on content creation and marketing deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Tech stack varies but often includes Node.js, React, and Ruby on Rails](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Collaboration is proactive, with transparent documentation and communication channels](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)

### Performance Metrics and Success Indicators

  - [Currently relying on short feedback loops and direct client communication](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Working on defining core success metrics and benchmarks for quality](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=1821.0)
  - [Performance review focuses on speed and quality, with quality being subjective to client satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

### Growth Opportunities and Compensation

  - [Role initially more production-oriented, with potential for growth in Q3/Q4](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
  - [Currently budgeted as a mid-level position, but open to discussing options for senior candidates](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=2211.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Renato to circle back with Tucker regarding compensation and role level for Steven](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=2239.0)
  - [Steven to keep GrowthX updated on his job search process](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussion on aligning role expectations and compensation](https://fathom.video/share/C22m-_nfCfPqj2f-dxLDtsgZRnt1uimB?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
